---
title: "Part 2：卷积神经网络"
author: jshn9515
date: 2026-05-05
date-modified: today
page-layout: full
comments: false

listing:
  contents:
    - "../ch7-regularization-and-normalization/*.qmd"
  sort: title asc
  type: table
  fields: [title, author, date]
  date-format: iso

open-graph:
  title: part2-convolutional-neural-networks
  description: "Part 2: Convolutional Neural Networks"
---
